columns.name: github_username
columns.description: GitHub username — used as the lookup key

columns.name: tech_stack
columns.description: Comma-separated primary languages/frameworks from GitHub repos

columns.name: top_repos
columns.description: JSON array string of top 5 repo names and descriptions

columns.name: current_projects
columns.description: Active project names and one-line descriptions

columns.name: upcoming_events
columns.description: Time-sensitive events from resume, e.g. interviews, deadlines

columns.name: company_context
columns.description: Current employer or target companies mentioned in resume

columns.name: resume_file_path
columns.description: Lemma Files path for the uploaded PDF resume
